```tactics
/-! ### H√∂lder inequality -/

namespace MeasureTheory
section Real
variable {Œ± : Type*} {mŒ± : MeasurableSpace Œ±} [DiscreteMeasurableSpace Œ±] [Fintype Œ±] {p q : ‚Ñù‚â•0}

lemma cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg (hf : 0 ‚â§ f) (hg : 0 ‚â§ g) : ‚Äñf * g‚Äñ‚Çô_[1] = ‚ü™f, g‚ü´‚Çô_[‚Ñù] := by
```

```tactics
    ‚ü™f, f‚ü´‚Çô_[ùïú] = ((‚Äñf‚Äñ‚Çô_[2] : ‚Ñù) : ùïú) ^ 2 := by
  simp_rw [‚Üê algebraMap.coe_pow, ‚Üê NNReal.coe_pow]
```

```tactics
/-! # Inner product -/

open Finset hiding card
open Fintype (card)
open Function MeasureTheory RCLike Real
open scoped BigOperators ComplexConjugate ENNReal NNReal NNRat
```

```tactics
variable {Œπ Œ∫ ùïú : Type*} [Fintype Œπ]

namespace RCLike
variable [RCLike ùïú] {mŒπ : MeasurableSpace Œπ} [DiscreteMeasurableSpace Œπ] {f : Œπ ‚Üí ùïú}
```

```tactics
@[simp] lemma wInner_cWeight_self (f : Œπ ‚Üí ùïú) :
    ‚ü™f, f‚ü´‚Çô_[ùïú] = ((‚Äñf‚Äñ‚Çô_[2] : ‚Ñù) : ùïú) ^ 2 := by
  simp_rw [‚Üê algebraMap.coe_pow, ‚Üê NNReal.coe_pow]
  simp [cL2Norm_sq_eq_expect_nnnorm, wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
```

```tactics
lemma cL1Norm_mul (f g : Œπ ‚Üí ùïú) : ‚Äñf * g‚Äñ‚Çô_[1] = ‚ü™fun i ‚Ü¶ ‚Äñf i‚Äñ, fun i ‚Ü¶ ‚Äñg i‚Äñ‚ü´‚Çô_[‚Ñù] := by
  simp [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm, mul_comm]
```

```tactics
/-- **Cauchy-Schwarz inequality** -/
lemma wInner_cWeight_le_cL2Norm_mul_cL2Norm (f g : Œπ ‚Üí ‚Ñù) : ‚ü™f, g‚ü´‚Çô_[‚Ñù] ‚â§ ‚Äñf‚Äñ‚Çô_[2] * ‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[2] := by
  simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cL2Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm, ‚Üê NNReal.coe_mul, expect,
    ‚Üê NNRat.cast_smul_eq_nnqsmul ‚Ñù‚â•0, smul_eq_mul, ‚Üê NNReal.mul_rpow, mul_mul_mul_comm, ‚Üê sq]
  simp only [NNReal.mul_rpow, ‚Üê dL2Norm_eq_sum_nnnorm, card_univ]
  rw [‚Üê NNReal.rpow_two, NNReal.rpow_rpow_inv two_ne_zero, NNReal.smul_def, smul_eq_mul]
  push_cast
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dL2Norm_mul_dL2Norm _ _
```

```tactics
end RCLike
```

```tactics
      have h18 : ‚àë i : Œ±, ‚Äñf i‚Äñ ^ p * ‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû] ^ p = (‚àë i : Œ±, ‚Äñf i‚Äñ ^ p) * ‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû] ^ p := by
        rw [Finset.sum_mul]
        <;> ring
```

So $\sum_{a \in \alpha} ‚Äñf a‚Äñ ^ p * ‚Äñg‚Äñ_{\infty}^p = \left( \sum_{a \in \alpha} ‚Äñf a‚Äñ ^ p \right) \cdot ‚Äñg‚Äñ_{\infty}^p.$

Therefore, $\sum_{a \in \alpha} ‚Äñf a‚Äñ ^ p * ‚Äñg a‚Äñ ^ p \leq \left( \sum_{a \in \alpha} ‚Äñf a‚Äñ ^ p \right) \cdot ‚Äñg‚Äñ_{\infty}^p.$

So we have $\|f \cdot g\|_p^p \leq \|f\|_p^p \cdot \|g\|_\infty^p.$


Now, we have $\|f \cdot g\|_p^p \leq \|f\|_p^p \cdot \|g\|_\infty^p.$


And $\|g\|_\infty$.

```tactics
    have h14 : ‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû] = (‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû] : ‚Ñù) := by

```

Now, we need to show that $\|f \cdot g\|_p \leq \|f\|_p \cdot \|g\|_\infty.$

```tactics
    have h15 : ‚Äñf * g‚Äñ‚Çô_[p] ^ p ‚â§ (‚Äñf‚Äñ‚Çô_[p] * ‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû]) ^ p := by

        _ = (‚Äñf‚Äñ‚Çô_[p] ^ p) * (‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû] ^ p) := by

        _ = (‚Äñf‚Äñ‚Çô_[p] * ‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû]) ^ p := by

```

Now, we have $\|f \cdot g\|_p^p \leq (\|f\|_p \cdot \|g\|_\infty)^p.$

To take the $p$-th root, we need to show that $\|f \cdot g\|_p \leq \|f\|_p \cdot \|g\|_\infty.$

```tactics
    have h16 : ‚Äñf * g‚Äñ‚Çô_[p] ‚â§ ‚Äñf‚Äñ‚Çô_[p] * ‚Äñg‚Äñ‚Çô_[‚àû] := by
```
